banner.title: Upholstery Cleaning Service
banner.description: Renew your furniture with bEasy's upholstery cleaning - we remove stains, dust, and allergens for a fresher home.

taskInfo.title: What’s Included in Your Cleaning Tasks?
taskInfo.description: Upholstery cleaning is the process of removing dirt, stains, allergens, and other contaminants from upholstered furniture such as sofas, chairs, and mattresses. Over time, upholstery can accumulate dust, pet dander, food spills, and other debris that can affect the appearance and hygiene of your furniture. Professional upholstery cleaning services use specialized equipment and cleaning solutions to deep clean and refresh your furniture, helping to extend its lifespan and improve indoor air quality.
taskInfo.subtitle: Information of procedure

taskList.title: Information of procedure
items: Vacuum all sofa surfaces
Spray specialized cleaning solution on all sofa surfaces
Use scrubber to remove stains and grime
Vacuum remaining residue
Rinse and vacuum again
Vacuum dry
Tidy work area

banner.title: Pest Control Service
banner.description: Say goodbye to mosquitoes with our safe, powerful spray and fogging — protecting you and your loved ones from dengue and other viruses.

taskInfo.title: What’s Included in Your Cleaning Tasks?
taskInfo.description: PLACEHOLDER - Replace with full description for service id 5.
taskInfo.subtitle: Information of procedure

taskList.title: Pre-Service Preparation
items: Notify customer to vacate the area during and up to 1-2 hours post-service.
Cover or remove food items, and exposed surfaces.
Identify key infestation point and entry areas.

taskList.title: Insecticide Spray
items: Apply residual spray treatment on floors, walls, behind furniture, corners, cracks, drais, and high-risk areas.
Targeted for crawling insects like cockroaches, ants, bed bugs.

taskList.title: Cold Fogging (ULV Fogging)
items: Use ultra-low volume (ULV) fogger to disperse fine mist of insecticide.
Focus on open spaces, ceilings, dark corners, storage areas.
Effective against flying insects like mosquitoes and flies.

taskList.title: Post-Treatment
items: Allow 1-2 hours for treatment to settle before re-entry.

banner.title: Washing Machine Cleaning Service
banner.description: Book washing machine cleaning to remove mold and dirt. Keep your washer hygienic, odor-free, and lasting longer—all via our app.

taskInfo.title: What’s Included in Your Cleaning Tasks?
taskInfo.description: PLACEHOLDER - Replace with full description for service id 6.
taskInfo.subtitle: Information of procedure

taskList.title: Preparation
items: Unplug the washing machine from the power source.
Turn off both water supply inlet valves.
Ensure the drum is completely empty.
Prepare the following cleaning materials:
Washing machine cleaner soap
Soft cloth or sponge
Small brush or old toothbrush
Bucket and towel

taskList.title: Clean the Detergent Drawer
items: Pull out the detergent drawer completely.
Soak it in warm water mixed with mild detergent for a few miniutes.
Use a small brush to scrub away any residue or mold.
Rinse thoroughly and dry completely before reinstalling the drawer.

taskList.title: Clean the Rubber Door Seal (Front Loaders)
items: Open the door and gently pull back the rubber seal.
Use a damp cloth to remove dirt, lint, and trapped debris.
Wipe with a mild cleaning solution or disinfectant.
Dry thoroughly with a towel to prevent mold growth.

taskList.title: Deep Clean the Drum
items: Add the washing machine cleaner to the detergent tray or directly into the drum.
Run the Drum Clean or Tub Clean program (if available).
If no cleaning cycle is available, run a hot water cycle (60-90°C) with drum empty.

taskList.title: Clean the Drain Pump Filter
items: Locate the drain pump filter (usually at the bottom front panel).
Place a towel or shallow tray underneath to catch water.
Open the filter cover and remove lint, coins, or debris.
Rinse the filter under running water and reinstall it securely.

taskList.title: Clean the Exterior
items: Wipe all exterior surfaces using a soft cloth dampened with mild detergent.
Clean the control panel, lid, sides, and base carefully.
Avoid spraying water directly on buttons or ventilation areas.

taskList.title: Final Steps
items: Leave the door open for several hours to allow the interior to air dry completely.
Reconnect the water and power supply.
Run one short rinse cycle to ensure all cleaner is flushed out.
Record the cleaning date and initials on the maintenance log.

banner.title: Post Renovation Cleaning Service
banner.description: Just renovated? Book a post-renovation cleaning in Phnom Penh through our app. We clear dust, paint, and debris to make your space move-in ready.

taskInfo.title: What’s Included in Your Cleaning Tasks?
taskInfo.description: PLACEHOLDER - Replace with full description for service id 7.
taskInfo.subtitle: Information of procedure

taskList.title: Initial Dust & Debris Removal
items: Remove all construction debris, packaging, and leftover materials.
Sweep and vacuum floors to clear fine dust.
Wipe down walls and baseboards to remove dust and paint splatters.

taskList.title: Detailed Surface Cleaning
items: Clean all horizontal and vertical surfaces (walls, ledges, counters, shelves).
Dust and wipe light fixtures, switches, and outlets.
Remove adhesive, stickers, or protective plastic from new surfaces.
Wash and polish windows inside and outside.
Clean window frames, tracks, and sills.
Remove paint, dust, or cement splashes on glass.

taskList.title: Floor Care
items: Vacuum carpets and rugs (deep clean if necessary).
Mop and polish hard floors (tile, wood, laminate, etc.).
Remove paint, glue, or cement residue on flooring.

taskList.title: Kitchen Cleaning
items: Wipe down cabinets (inside & outside).
Clean countertops, sinks, faucets, and backsplash.
Clean new appliances (inside & outside).
Scrub tiles, grout, and remove construction dust.
Clean mirrors, shower glass, sinks, tubs, and toilets.
Polish faucets and stainless-steel fittings.
Dust and wipe doors, handles, and hinges.
Clean wardrobes, built-in shelves, and furniture.
Polish metal, wood, or glass fixtures.
Remove protective tape, stickers, and marks.
Wipe air vents, ceiling fans, and AC units.
Dispose of all trash and ensure site is move-in ready.

banner.title: AC Cleaning Service
banner.description: Stay cool and energy-efficient with our AC cleaning service in Phnom Penh. Get cleaner air, faster cooling, and lower bills—on-demand through our app.

taskInfo.title: What’s Included in Your Cleaning Tasks?
taskInfo.description: PLACEHOLDER - Replace with full description for service id 8.
taskInfo.subtitle: Information of procedure

taskList.title: Safety Preparation
items: Turn off the AC unit and disconnect the power supply
Place a waterproof sheet under the unit to catch dust and water.

taskList.title: Indoor Unit Cleaning (Evaporator & Filters)
items: Remove and wash air filters with mild soap and water. Let them dry completely.
Clean evaporator coils using a soft brush or coil cleaner.
Wipe the blower wheel and fins to remove dust buildup.
Disinfect the drain pan and ensure the drain pipe is not clogged.

taskList.title: Outdoor Unit Cleaning (Condenser)
items: Turn off power and open the outdoor unit cover.
Clean condenser coils with a brush or coil cleaner.
Remove leaves, dirt, and debris around the unit.
Check fan blades and clean them.
Ensure proper airflow clearance (no obstructions within 2-3 feet).

taskList.title: Drain Line Maintenance
items: Flush the drain pipe with water or a cleaning solution to remove clogs and prevent leaks.
Ensure proper drainage flow.

taskList.title: Electrical & Performance Check
items: Inspect wiring, connections, and thermostat.
Check cooling performance and refrigerant pressure (technician required).
Run the system to ensure it operates normally.

taskList.title: Final Steps
items: Reinstall all parts properly.
Wipe the outer casing and surrounding area.
Restore power and test the AC.
